thermal_diagram.summary: Chamber air and a fluid-controlled interface drive two representative DUT thermal nodes with different mass, coupling, self-heating, and sensor behavior.
notes: High-power node responds quickly and self-heats during functional gates.
Isolated node is deliberately slower, showing delayed stabilization evidence.
